title: centaurea gracilenta
intro: Centaurea gracilenta, also known as slender cornflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and cough suppressant properties. Centaurea gracilenta can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed for therapeutic purposes.
